description.value: With a single primal howl, you strike fear in your opponents. Until the end of the spell’s duration, you treat those affected by it as if they were your favored enemy, gaining a +2 bonus on weapon attack and damage rolls against them, and a +2 bonus on Bluff, Knowledge, Perception, Sense Motive, and Survival checks against them. If an affected creature is already one of your favored enemies, it is shaken instead. This is a mind-affecting fear effect. Section 15: Copyright Notice Advanced Player’s Guide.
